title: Tracking Daily Calorie Intake in C

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to calculate the total calories consumed in a day through three meals. Then subtract the calories burned during exercise to find the net calorie intake. Use the addition (`+`) and subtraction (`-`) operators, and display all values clearly.

---

**Expected Output:**

```default
Total Calories Consumed: 1450
Calories Burned: 400
Net Calorie Intake: 1050
```
